creator: _jkrow
caption:
If you’re planning a Finger Lakes weekend and want something that feels a little more unique than the typical winery stop, this is SUCH a good dinner spot to add to your itinerary.

From the front, Stonecat Cafe looks like a tiny roadside spot along Seneca Lake - but out back, it completely transforms into one of the prettiest dinner settings in the Finger Lakes.

• Order at the counter first, then grab a seat inside or outside
• It feels a little quirky and artsy like a hidden PNW cafe tucked into Upstate NY

We did a 3 course dinner with asparagus soup, scallops, dessert, and wine pairings and prices were surprisingly reasonable for the Finger Lakes! 

📍Stonecat Cafe - Hector, NY on Seneca Lake
